chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5632 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.4502/2024 3. For hearing of main case 15.10.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Per learned counsel, the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of having been infructuous. Order accordingly. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
